headline: Comcast Links AI Ad Targeting And Broadband Expansion To Valuation Story
summary: Comcast's FreeWheel has introduced an AI powered Context Engine for premium video ad targeting, aimed at improving how ads are matched to content for media clients. The company is also rolling out broadband and service network expansions across Connecticut and Central Florida, with a focus on multi gigabit internet and bundled offerings. These moves come as Comcast (NasdaqGS:CMCSA) continues to invest in both its advertising technology platform and core connectivity footprint in key U.S...
